required_preferences.fact: Visits his mother daily after work and assists with meals, medication, and mobility — calls only if unable to visit in person that day

supersedes.fact: Calls his mother every Sunday evening even if also visiting earlier in the week; says it establishes continuity

required_preferences.fact: Suspends the Thursday strategic planning block to remain available for urgent crisis management and constant incident updates, until the plant breach is resolved

supersedes.fact: Blocks two hours every Thursday morning for uninterrupted strategic planning — no calls, emails, or meetings allowed during this time

required_preferences.fact: Schedules midweek family video calls from Frankfurt to stay connected during international trips.
Explores Columbus metro parks with family one Sunday afternoon per month — refuses to visit the same park twice in a season
Reviews nightly CPAP sleep quality statistics with his spouse weekly — uses the feedback to discuss health goals and adjust bedtime routines
Eats lunch in the staff cafeteria with line workers during factory rotation; declines executive dining room access for the duration

persona: An executive at a manufacturing firm overseeing digital transformation initiatives
